goal_summary: The patient wanted to escalate a billing complaint and speak to a manager, but was disconnected without achieving this goal.

bugs_found.evidence: But I have the same level of access as the supervise
Hello. You've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
But I have the same level of access as the supervise

bugs_found.new_title: Agent fails to specify transfer to a manager

summary: The patient called to escalate a billing issue and speak to a manager but was disconnected after being routed to a test line. The agent claimed equal authority to a supervisor and failed to properly escalate the call, resulting in the patient's goal not being achieved.
